name: Fortinet
analysis: FTNT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $147.8600, stop $131.7195, target $196.2815 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
